title: [security] Weak/Forgeable CRC32 MIC fallback in link layer (P0)
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_rx.c:verify_mic() and lichen_l2.c accept CRC32 "MIC" when !has_link_key or CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK_INSECURE_CRC32_MIC=y. CRC32 is trivial to forge (no auth). Enables frame injection, spoofing, bypass of Schnorr-48. Dev configs and no-key paths deploy this in prod. See Kconfig warnings, replay.c comments, spec/06-security.md. Matches "weak MIC (e.g. CRC32 in prod)". Impact: full link-layer compromise. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-lw4f
